summary: 4-phase plan created: (1) document boundary claim in temporal_depth() and ForAllTime() docstrings, (2) create test_boundary_regression.py with hand-crafted formulas demonstrating boundary vacuity at insufficient M and correct behavior at sufficient M, (3) 43-example regression test verifying all active examples produce correct SAT/UNSAT, (4) gate validation. No Z3 constraint changes -- research recommends dynamic M in OracleProvider (task 103) instead.
